bug.actual_behavior: The remote download path always ran a shallow clone of the whole repository first, then resolved skills_path locally, so a large repository such as ChineseResearchLaTeX downloaded unrelated non-skill content.
bug.additional_notes: Fixed in project source version 0.5.6; no installed system-level skill source was edited.
evidence: _download_remote_source used git clone --depth 1 for the full repository before calling _resolve_remote_skills_root(repo_root, skills_path).
bug.expected_behavior: When a remote source sets skills_path to a subdirectory such as skills, the installer should download only that target skill subtree when possible.
bug.impact: 这是由 skill 设计缺陷导致的真实环境问题，需要纳入后续修复闭环。
reproduction_steps: Configure a remote source with url https://github.com/huangwb8/ChineseResearchLaTeX and skills_path skills.
Run install-bensz-skills in remote check or auto mode for the research source.
bug.summary: Remote install cloned entire large repository even when skills_path targeted a subdirectory
bug.workaround: Patch the project source so non-root skills_path uses git clone --filter=blob:none --sparse followed by git sparse-checkout set <skills_path>, with full shallow clone fallback.

bug.actual_behavior: The remote download path always ran a shallow clone of the whole repository first, then resolved skills_path locally, so a large repository such as ChineseResearchLaTeX downloaded unrelated non-skill content.
bug.expected_behavior: When a remote source sets skills_path to a subdirectory such as skills, the installer should download only that target skill subtree when possible.
bug.summary: Remote install cloned entire large repository even when skills_path targeted a subdirectory
